title: FOOD FOR THE SOUL - 211info
text: PEOPLE'S COLLECTIVE COMMUNITY CENTER FOOD FOR THE SOUL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers garden and cooking classes. Additional services are offered to increase an individual's food stability, including budgeting assistance, meal preparation planning, and dietician counseling with a licensed professional. 1695 Jefferson Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Unrestricted but with a focus on the African-American community Hours: Varies by service Email (541) 868-6337 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 868-6337 Michelle Hjelm [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of Jefferson Street and 17th Avenue Services: Cooking Classes * African American Community Home Gardening Assistance/Supplies * African American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL LITERACY CLASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PEOPLE'S COLLECTIVE COMMUNITY CENTER
